overview: West Coast Men's Health provides evidence-based medical care for men addressing age-related changes in sexual health, hormone balance, nerve health, and physical function. Treatment plans are personalized and delivered in a clinical setting under the direction of Medical Director Dr. Jonathan Hodor.
highlights: Acoustic Wave Therapy for erectile dysfunction and neuropathy
Multiple TRT delivery options including injections, gels, and pellets
Non-invasive treatments including peptide therapy and red light bed therapy
targetAudience: Men experiencing age-related changes in sexual health, hormone balance, or nerve health who seek medically supervised, evidence-based care.
